stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 2, when must all aircraft on the movement area of an aerodrome display navigation lights to indicate their relative path?

options.a: From sunset to sunrise, or during any other period prescribed by the appropriate authority.
options.b: Day and night unless the appropriate authority prescribes otherwise.
options.c: From sunset to sunrise and whenever low-visibility procedures are in effect.
options.d: Whenever the pilot-in-command deems it necessary.
